Localization.Description: Actions with a role in SKDPU

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.application.account.name} created role "{object.name}" in SKDPU on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.application.account.name} changed role "{object.name}" in SKDPU on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.application.account.name} deleted role "{object.name}" in SKDPU on host {event_src.host}
